zh.lifeSummary: Alice Kennedy是John Kennedy和Lady Alice Kennedy的女兒，於1503年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾可泰斯布盧可。她於1524年與William Bosworth在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾可泰斯布盧可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1560年在她的家鄉享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Kennedy was born in 1503, in Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of John Kennedy and Lady Alice Kennedy. She married William Bosworth in 1524, in Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1560, in her hometown, at the age of 57.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Kennedyは1503年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコッテスブルークでJohn KennedyとLady Alice Kennedyの娘として生まれた。1524年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコッテスブルークでWilliam Bosworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1560年に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Kennedy(은)는 1503년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 컷스브룩에서 John Kennedy(와)과 Lady Alice Kennedy의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1524년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 컷스브룩에서 William Bosworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1560년 그녀의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.
